description: baseline: faithful Python port of armeniaRegions.js from A1-Localization-AM. 11 administrative divisions (10 marzes + Yerevan), keyed on ISO 3166-2:AM codes. 4 functions (regionByCode, isValidRegionCode, findRegion, citiesForRegion). 20 cases cover all valid query shapes (code, name, case-insensitive, whitespace) + invalid (unknown code, empty, non-region names). 100% on first run.
